inputs.label: Roof Footprint Area
inputs.businessContext: Total horizontal area covered by the roof (length × width) in square meters.

label_i18n.es: Área de la huella del techo

businessContext_i18n.en: Total horizontal area covered by the roof (length × width) in square meters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çatının kapladığı toplam yatay alan (uzunluk × genişlik) metrekare cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte horizontale Fläche des Daches (Länge × Breite) in Quadratmetern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Surface horizontale totale couverte par le toit (longueur × largeur) en mètres carrés.
businessContext_i18n.es: Área horizontal total cubierta por el techo (largo × ancho) en metros cuadrados.

inputs.label: Roof Pitch Angle
inputs.businessContext: Inclination angle of the roof from horizontal, in degrees.

businessContext_i18n.en: Inclination angle of the roof from horizontal, in degrees.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çatının yataydan eğim açısı, derece cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Neigungswinkel des Daches zur Horizontalen in Grad.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Angle d'inclinaison du toit par rapport à l'horizontale, en degrés.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ángulo de inclinación del techo desde la horizontal, en grados.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Additional material percentage for cutting, overlap, and handling losses.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional material percentage for cutting, overlap, and handling losses.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesim, bindirme ve taşıma kayıpları için ek malzeme yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzlicher Materialprozentsatz für Verschnitt, Überlappung und Handhabungsverluste.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de matériau supplémentaire pour les pertes de coupe, de chevauchement et de manutention.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de material adicional por pérdidas de corte, solapamiento y manipulación.

inputs.label: Shingle Coverage per Bundle
inputs.businessContext: Area covered by one bundle of field shingles, typically 3.1 m² for standard 3-tab.

businessContext_i18n.en: Area covered by one bundle of field shingles, typically 3.1 m² for standard 3-tab.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir paket düz shingle'ın kapladığı alan, standart 3-tab için tipik olarak 3,1 m².
businessContext_i18n.de: Fläche, die von einem Bündel Feldschindeln abgedeckt wird, typischerweise 3,1 m² für Standard-3-Tab.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Surface couverte par un paquet de bardeaux de champ, typiquement 3,1 m² pour les bardeaux standard à 3 pattes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Área cubierta por un paquete de tejas de campo, típicamente 3.1 m² para tejas estándar de 3 lengüetas.

inputs.label: Ridge Length
inputs.businessContext: Total length of ridges and hips requiring cap shingles, in meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total length of ridges and hips requiring cap shingles, in meters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kapak shingle'ı gerektiren mahya ve çatı kırım hatlarının toplam uzunluğu, metre cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtlänge von Firsten und Graten, die Abschlussschindeln erfordern, in Metern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur totale des faîtes et arêtiers nécessitant des bardeaux de faîtage, en mètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud total de cumbreras y limatesas que requieren tejas de cumbrera, en metros.

inputs.label: Cap Coverage per Bundle
inputs.businessContext: Linear ridge coverage provided by one bundle of cap shingles, typically 10 m for 3-tab caps.

label_i18n.fr: Couverture par paquet de bardeaux de faîtage

businessContext_i18n.en: Linear ridge coverage provided by one bundle of cap shingles, typically 10 m for 3-tab caps.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir paket kapak shingle'ının sağladığı doğrusal mahya kapsama alanı, 3-tab kapaklar için tipik olarak 10 m.
businessContext_i18n.de: Lineare Firstabdeckung, die von einem Bündel Abschlussschindeln bereitgestellt wird, typischerweise 10 m für 3-Tab-Abschlüsse.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Couverture linéaire de faîtage fournie par un paquet de bardeaux de faîtage, typiquement 10 m pour les bardeaux à 3 pattes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cobertura lineal de cumbrera proporcionada por un paquete de tejas de cumbrera, típicamente 10 m para cumbreras de 3 lengüetas.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
